title: Manifest Printing Utility
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory contains the 'ManifestPrinter.java' utility. This tool assists in debugging and monitoring by displaying the contents of the manifest file. It reads data from a specified file using Hadoop FileSystem, accepting the manifest file path as a command-line argument. The utility outputs diagnostics and I/O statistics, adhering to a utility pattern for system debugging and performance analysis. This directory follows a supporting role, providing ancillary functions to the main output process.
